blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 49°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
